value.found_quote: Today, we’re bringing those together with three new offerings on Amazon Bedrock, all in limited preview: the latest OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents powered by OpenAI.
value.rationale: The page describes OpenAI's Codex and Managed Agents (powered by OpenAI) being offered on Amazon Bedrock in limited preview. It explicitly mentions "Codex" as the OpenAI coding agent and "Managed Agents powered by OpenAI," directly substantiating the claim. The page repeatedly states these are in "limited preview."
